title: Why “jogos de brasileirão série b” is trending in BR: 5,000+ searches, the facts (July 18, 2026)
description: “jogos de brasileirão série b” is trending in BR with 5,000+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from Band and 2 more.

sources.title: CRB tem agora o artilheiro isolado e o melhor ataque da Série B
Análise do VAR: CRB (AL) X Náutico (PE) - 18ª Rodada do Brasileirão Série B 2026 - 16/07/2026
Novo artilheiro do Brasil faz gol e vence na Série B

sections.heading: What is trending: “jogos de brasileirão série b”
paragraphs: “jogos de brasileirão série b” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for BR (snapshot taken 2026-07-18T09:08:50+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 5,000 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from Band, CBF, ge. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “CRB tem agora o artilheiro isolado e o melhor ataque da Série B” — ge
“Análise do VAR: CRB (AL) X Náutico (PE) - 18ª Rodada do Brasileirão Série B 2026 - 16/07/2026” — CBF
“Novo artilheiro do Brasil faz gol e vence na Série B” — Band

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sat, 18 Jul 2026 01:40:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-18T09:08:50+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-18T09:08:54+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.q: Why is “jogos de brasileirão série b” trending?
faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from Band, CBF, ge. The associated headlines are: “CRB tem agora o artilheiro isolado e o melhor ataque da Série B” (ge); “Análise do VAR: CRB (AL) X Náutico (PE) - 18ª Rodada do Brasileirão Série B 2026 - 16/07/2026” (CBF); “Novo artilheiro do Brasil faz gol e vence na Série B” (Band).

faq.q: How many people searched for “jogos de brasileirão série b”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 5,000 searches in BR as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.

faq.q: Where is “jogos de brasileirão série b” trending?
faq.a: This snapshot covers BR. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
